MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:(Zoom appearance)
Justin Goodman, 415.956.8100 of Zacks, Freedman & Patterson, P.C. for Defendant 2124 Taylor LLC.
Raquel Fox, 415.771.9850 of Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. for Plaintiffs, Samuel Hiona, Cathleen Thompson, Dennis Thompson, Beht Bledsoe and Ana Ganovic.

Argued. The Court rules as follows: CROSS DEFENDANTS SAMUEL HIONA, CATHLEEN THOMPSON, DENNIS THOMPSON, BETH BLEDSOE and ANA GANOVIC'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is DENIED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for damages due to unauthorized entry/possession/use of the cross-complainant's property.
